kpis.name: Overall Supplier Cyber Risk Score
kpis.tooltip: Aggregated view of supplier cyber exposure across the portfolio. Indicates if overall risk is within appetite.

kpis.name: High Risk Suppliers
kpis.tooltip: Number of suppliers exceeding defined risk thresholds. Indicates where immediate action is required.

kpis.name: Critical Suppliers at Risk
kpis.tooltip: Tier 1 suppliers above risk appetite. Highlights potential business disruption risks.
kpis.formula: COUNT suppliers WHERE tier = Tier 1 AND residual_risk = High

kpis.name: Loss Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Estimated financial impact of supplier cyber risk. Used to prioritize investments.

kpis.name: Exposure Trend %
kpis.tooltip: Shows whether supplier risk exposure is increasing or decreasing over time.

kpis.name: Forecasted Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Predicted future exposure based on trends. Supports proactive planning.

kpis.name: Predicted Risk Breaches
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers likely to exceed risk thresholds soon. Enables early intervention.

kpis.name: Top Business Impact Area
kpis.tooltip: Business unit with highest supplier exposure. Helps prioritize risk reduction.

kpis.name: Suppliers Assessed
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers that completed formal cyber assessment. Indicates assurance coverage.

kpis.name: Continuously Monitored
kpis.tooltip: Share of suppliers with active monitoring enabled. Measures ongoing risk visibility.

kpis.name: Critical Findings
kpis.tooltip: Number of unresolved critical issues across suppliers. Highlights immediate remediation priority.
kpis.formula: COUNT findings WHERE severity = Critical AND status != Closed

kpis.name: Inventory Completeness
kpis.tooltip: Measures how complete the supplier inventory is. Gaps indicate unmanaged risks.

kpis.name: High-Risk Vendor %
kpis.tooltip: Share of suppliers classified as high risk. Indicates overall portfolio risk distribution.

kpis.name: Average Cyber Rating
kpis.tooltip: Average external security posture score across suppliers.

kpis.name: Top Vendor Concentration Ratio
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of exposure concentrated in the riskiest supplier.

kpis.name: Classified Vendors
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers with completed risk classification. Indicates portfolio profiling maturity.

kpis.name: Tier 1 Vendors
kpis.tooltip: Count of highest criticality suppliers. Tracks concentration of business-critical dependencies.

kpis.name: Concentration Index
kpis.tooltip: Composite measure of exposure concentration across key suppliers. Higher values indicate less diversification.

kpis.name: Fourth Parties
kpis.tooltip: Number of identified downstream providers linked to direct suppliers. Indicates extended ecosystem complexity.

kpis.name: Single-Supplier Services
kpis.tooltip: Services supported by only one supplier. Highlights resilience and substitution risk.

kpis.name: High Criticality / High Risk
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers that are both business critical and high risk. Priority segment for mitigation and contingency planning.
kpis.formula: COUNT suppliers WHERE criticality = High AND residual_risk = High

kpis.name: Top Vendor Concentration
kpis.tooltip: Exposure share concentrated in the single highest-impact supplier.

kpis.name: Score Drops
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers with declining security ratings. Early warning signal.

kpis.name: Critical Vulnerabilities
kpis.tooltip: Number of severe technical exposures detected. Indicates immediate risk.
kpis.formula: COUNT signals WHERE type = Vulnerability AND severity = Critical

kpis.name: Leaked Credentials
kpis.tooltip: Instances of exposed credentials. Indicates potential unauthorized access risk.
kpis.formula: COUNT signals WHERE type = Credential Leak

kpis.name: Monitored Vendors
kpis.tooltip: Number of suppliers currently under continuous external monitoring.

kpis.name: New Exposed Assets
kpis.tooltip: Newly discovered internet-facing assets associated with suppliers. Indicates expanding attack surface.

kpis.name: Cloud Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers with detected cloud security exposure signals. Tracks cloud-related risk concentration.
kpis.formula: COUNT signals WHERE domain = Cloud AND status = Open

kpis.name: DNS / Email Issues
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers with DNS or email-security misconfiguration indicators. Includes SPF, DKIM, and DMARC-related issues.
kpis.formula: COUNT signals WHERE type IN (DNS, Email) AND status = Open

kpis.name: Critical Alerts
kpis.tooltip: Number of active critical-priority monitoring alerts requiring immediate action.
kpis.formula: COUNT alerts WHERE severity = Critical AND status = Open

kpis.name: New Vulnerability Trend
kpis.tooltip: Trend in newly identified supplier vulnerabilities over time.

kpis.name: Breach Signal Count
kpis.tooltip: Count of breach-related indicators detected across monitored suppliers.

kpis.name: Open Findings
kpis.tooltip: Total unresolved security issues. Represents remediation backlog.

kpis.name: MTTR
kpis.tooltip: Average time to resolve a risk. Key indicator of remediation effectiveness.

kpis.name: SLA Breaches
kpis.tooltip: Issues not resolved within agreed timelines. Indicates process inefficiencies.

kpis.name: Critical Findings
kpis.tooltip: Open remediation items with critical severity. Represents highest-priority backlog.
kpis.formula: COUNT findings WHERE severity = Critical AND status != Closed

kpis.name: MTTA
kpis.tooltip: Mean time to acknowledge findings after detection. Indicates triage responsiveness.

kpis.name: Closure Rate
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of findings closed within the reporting period.

kpis.name: Reopened Findings
kpis.tooltip: Findings reopened after closure, indicating ineffective or incomplete remediation.

kpis.name: Accepted Risks
kpis.tooltip: Findings formally accepted instead of remediated. Tracks risk acceptance volume.
kpis.formula: COUNT findings WHERE treatment = Risk Accepted

kpis.name: Backlog Growth
kpis.tooltip: Change in open finding backlog compared to previous period.

kpis.name: Findings per Analyst
kpis.tooltip: Average open findings assigned per remediation analyst. Indicates workload balance.

kpis.name: Total Exposure / ALE
kpis.tooltip: Total estimated financial risk from suppliers. Core metric for decision making.

kpis.name: Top Risk Drivers
kpis.tooltip: Main causes contributing to exposure. Helps target root causes.
kpis.formula: RANK BY SUM exposure BY driver

kpis.name: Residual Risk Trend
kpis.tooltip: Change in remaining risk after controls. Indicates effectiveness of mitigation.

kpis.name: Top Supplier Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Estimated financial exposure attributed to the highest-risk supplier.

kpis.name: High-Risk Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Total exposure associated with suppliers classified as high risk.

kpis.name: Risk Reduction Opportunity
kpis.tooltip: Estimated exposure that could be reduced through prioritized mitigations.

kpis.name: Concentration Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Exposure tied to concentration in key suppliers, services, or geographies.

kpis.name: Accepted Risk Value
kpis.tooltip: Monetary value of supplier-related risks currently accepted by the business.

kpis.name: Forecasted Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Projected supplier exposure for upcoming periods based on trend and scenario models.

kpis.name: Top Vendor Concentration
kpis.tooltip: Exposure concentration percentage for the highest-impact supplier.

kpis.name: Cloud Concentration Ratio
kpis.tooltip: Share of total exposure concentrated in the dominant cloud provider.

kpis.name: Fourth-Party Concentration
kpis.tooltip: Exposure concentration tied to the most significant downstream provider.

kpis.name: Assessment Completion
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of completed supplier risk assessments. Tracks overall review progress.

kpis.name: Tier 1 Completion
kpis.tooltip: Coverage of assessments for critical suppliers. Ensures highest-priority vendors are reviewed first.

kpis.name: Avg Onboarding Cycle
kpis.tooltip: Average time to assess and onboard suppliers. Indicates efficiency of the supplier risk review process.

kpis.name: Overdue Assessments
kpis.tooltip: Number of assessments past due date. Highlights backlog and potential unmanaged supplier risk.

kpis.name: Evidence Completion
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of assessments with complete supporting evidence. Reflects audit readiness and assessment quality.

kpis.name: Control Pass Rate
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of assessed controls that passed. Indicates supplier control effectiveness.

kpis.name: Conditional Approvals
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers approved with known risks. Tracks risk acceptance during onboarding.

kpis.name: Reassessments Due
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers requiring reassessment soon. Helps manage upcoming workload and risk refresh cycles.

kpis.name: Fourth Parties Identified
kpis.tooltip: Number of downstream dependencies identified. Reflects visibility into extended supply chain risk.

kpis.name: Tier 1 Dependencies Mapped
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of critical suppliers with mapped downstream dependencies. Indicates depth of dependency visibility.

kpis.name: High-Risk Dependencies
kpis.tooltip: Downstream providers classified as high risk. Highlights hidden exposure beyond direct suppliers.

kpis.name: Cloud Concentration
kpis.tooltip: Measures dependency concentration across cloud providers. High concentration may increase systemic outage risk.

kpis.name: Cloud Concentration Ratio
kpis.tooltip: Share of supplier exposure tied to one cloud provider. Highlights cloud-related single points of failure.

kpis.name: Fourth-Party Concentration Ratio
kpis.tooltip: Share of dependency exposure concentrated in one downstream provider. Indicates cascading risk potential.

kpis.name: Single Points of Failure
kpis.tooltip: Services dependent on only one supplier or dependency. Indicates resilience weakness.

kpis.name: Country Concentration
kpis.tooltip: Measures supplier and dependency exposure by geography. Highlights regional or geopolitical concentration risk.

kpis.name: Cascading Exposure
kpis.tooltip: Estimated financial impact from failures across dependency chains. Shows systemic risk amplification.

kpis.name: Dependency Change Events
kpis.tooltip: Number of changes in the supplier dependency ecosystem. Indicates evolving exposure that may require review.

kpis.name: Security Clause Coverage
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers with contractual security requirements. Indicates baseline control enforcement.

kpis.name: Breach Notification SLA
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers with contractual incident notification timelines. Ensures timely awareness of supplier incidents.

kpis.name: Audit Rights Coverage
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers where audit rights are contractually defined. Indicates ability to verify supplier controls.

kpis.name: MFA Requirement Coverage
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers contractually required to use MFA. Reflects access control expectations.

kpis.name: Encryption Requirement Coverage
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers with encryption obligations. Indicates contractual data protection coverage.

kpis.name: SOC 2 / ISO Coverage
kpis.tooltip: Percentage of suppliers with valid SOC 2 or ISO evidence. Provides assurance of supplier control maturity.

kpis.name: Renewal Reviews
kpis.tooltip: Contracts requiring cyber review soon. Helps ensure security terms are refreshed before renewal.

kpis.name: Non-Compliant Suppliers
kpis.tooltip: Suppliers failing contractual or control requirements. Highlights compliance gaps requiring remediation or escalation.
